economic_hypothesis: The topology of executed ES volume across exact tick prices reveals realized auction congestion and release: traders defending a repeatedly occupied price or chasing the wrong side of a two-mode auction pay when the executed-price mode migrates, escapes, or is recaptured.
who_pays: Late aggressive traders who extrapolate a rejected departure, and inventory holders anchored to a heavily occupied executed-price level that subsequently loses control of the auction.
persistence_rationale: The class measures where exchange executions actually concentrate and revisit in tick-price space. It does not infer displayed depth, passive queue size, iceberg orders or cancellations; it is distinct from arrival timing, clip-size composition, aggressor-sign runs, event-clock completion and delayed impact relaxation.

source.raw_record_order: exchange event timestamp then stable source order after filtering one explicit ES contract

feature_policy.price_tick: round each decoded ES trade price to integer quarter-point ticks before aggregation
feature_policy.level_volume: sum executed trade size at each integer tick inside a completed minute
feature_policy.mode_tick: level with maximum volume; ties choose the level nearest volume-weighted mean tick, then the lower tick
feature_policy.second_mode_tick: highest-volume distinct level under the same deterministic tie break
feature_policy.mode_volume_share: executed volume at mode_tick divided by completed-minute total volume
feature_policy.top_two_volume_share: combined executed volume at the two highest-volume distinct levels divided by total volume
feature_policy.second_to_first_mode_ratio: second-mode volume divided by mode volume; zero when fewer than two levels exist
feature_policy.occupancy_entropy: Shannon entropy of volume shares by tick divided by log(unique_tick_count); zero for one level
feature_policy.unique_tick_count: number of distinct executed quarter-point ticks
feature_policy.revisit_count: number of transitions into a tick seen earlier in the same minute after at least one intervening different tick
feature_policy.revisit_ratio: revisit_count divided by the number of adjacent tick transitions, with zero denominator mapped to zero
feature_policy.signed_flow_fraction: buy aggressor size minus sell aggressor size divided by total trade size
feature_policy.mode_signed_flow_fraction: buy minus sell aggressor size executed at mode_tick divided by volume at mode_tick
feature_policy.maximum_excursion_from_mode_ticks: largest absolute ordered-trade excursion from mode_tick
feature_policy.maximum_excursion_direction: sign of the first ordered trade attaining maximum absolute excursion from mode_tick
feature_policy.mode_migration_ticks: current mode_tick minus the immediately prior contiguous completed-minute mode_tick in the same session and contract

past_only_state_policy.concentrated_occupancy: occupancy_entropy below its past 20th percentile AND mode_volume_share above its past 80th percentile
past_only_state_policy.directional_flow: absolute signed_flow_fraction above its past median and nonzero
past_only_state_policy.material_mode_departure: absolute last_minus_mode_ticks above its past 80th percentile and nonzero
past_only_state_policy.mode_recaptured: absolute last_minus_mode_ticks at or below its past 20th percentile
past_only_state_policy.material_mode_migration: absolute mode_migration_ticks above its past 80th percentile and nonzero
past_only_state_policy.bimodal_occupancy: top_two_volume_share above its past 80th percentile AND second_to_first_mode_ratio above its past median AND absolute second_mode_tick minus mode_tick above its past 80th percentile

motifs.definition: concentrated_occupancy AND material_mode_departure; direction is sign(last_minus_mode_ticks)
concentrated_occupancy AND large_mode_excursion AND mode_recaptured AND nonzero maximum_excursion_direction; direction is opposite maximum_excursion_direction
high_revisit AND directional_flow AND material_mode_departure AND sign(last_minus_mode_ticks) equals sign(signed_flow_fraction); direction is sign(signed_flow_fraction)
high_revisit AND directional_flow AND sign(last_minus_mode_ticks) differs from sign(signed_flow_fraction), including mode recapture; direction is opposite sign(signed_flow_fraction)
material_mode_migration AND directional_flow AND sign(mode_migration_ticks) equals sign(signed_flow_fraction) AND mode_volume_share above its past median; direction is sign(mode_migration_ticks)
bimodal_occupancy AND last executed tick lies strictly beyond the midpoint of mode_tick and second_mode_tick; direction is sign(last_tick minus that midpoint)

signal_policy.decision_timestamp: availability of the completed source minute
signal_policy.entry: first explicit-contract one-minute open at or after decision timestamp
signal_policy.exit: explicit-contract one-minute open exactly frozen holding_minutes after entry

cemetery_firewall.novelty_basis: exact executed tick occupancy, price-level revisitation and mode migration; no claim about displayed or passive book liquidity

CONTRE: Executed-price occupancy may only re-express realized volatility, range and current-minute direction; the two short calendar blocks may also make repeated-level states unstable. The frozen price-path tripwire, walk-forward, cost stress and candidate-specific power gate remain mandatory.
